text: Planners should not pre-check the critic checklist in progress.md — it signals review-complete when the critic hasn't run yet. Reset unchecked before critic iteration.
After a builder fix iteration, update progress.md status lines before handing to critic — stale 'fix needed' labels cause confusion about current state.

When qa.failed routes to inspector and all surfaces are already fully validated with failures fully characterized, progress.md should explicitly guide the inspector toward task.complete rather than re-inspection. This prevents unnecessary extra cycles.
